textByHashes.9ddab1e9a75f92c1a0b8776f5b8b0751c4fd61b5: I wished to see my god in mortal form and serve his will. In return for my service, the Emissaries promised me they could grant that wish.
textByHashes.154b72dd1e1f87cd97f66ecc926e9a9bd19670c3: I wished to see my god in mortal form and be granted eternity in Mictl. In return for my service, the Emissaries promised me they could grant that wish.
textByHashes.2c911640278389c70355e2d99d7e5c9f09e6ab2d: I am a humble servant of Ranul. It has always been my hope to stand before him and be judged as worthy.
textByHashes.414c570400f5c87329baccd9702896379d1cad01: The Final Dawn is the will of Ranul. He will show us all that death is nothing to be feared as he and Ralos guide us into forming a new world.
textByHashes.c780e3b0961e538c8b1413562f82d04a628873bc: The Final Dawn is the will of Ranul. He will show us all that death is nothing to be feared. He and Ralos will lead us into forming a new world before then guiding us to Mictl.
